title: Transcript:One Eyed Rosalee
wikitext:
{{Transcript|npc}}
{{Transcript list|One Eyed Rosalee|Captain Dawson|noplayer}}

==Standard dialogue==
* '''One Eyed Rosalee:''' You're one to talk! I paid plenty for that little encounter!
* '''Captain Dawson:''' One eye doesn't equal two of my best men!
* '''One Eyed Rosalee:''' We gave you plenty of chances to flee!
* '''Captain Dawson:''' If I ran away from you, I'd never hear the end of it!
* '''One Eyed Rosalee:''' Really? Then what about that fight in the Turtle Belt?
* '''Captain Dawson:''' That wasn't fleeing! It was a tactical repositioning! Besides, you're conveniently forgetting what happened at Brimhaven!
* '''One Eyed Rosalee:''' A boring fight! I had better things to do.
* '''Captain Dawson:''' Well, we'll have to make things more entertaining next time then!
* '''One Eyed Rosalee:''' I look forward to it, but for now, let's drink!
* '''Captain Dawson:''' Indeed! Cheers!
* {{tact|end}}
